name: Lemon Oat Bars Treat
recipeIngredient: 1 package (8 ounces) no fat cream cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the margarine and first 5 ingredients until crumbly.
2. Pat about three-quarters of the crust mixture into an ungreased 9-inch square pan.
3. Beat the softened cream cheese with sugar until smooth. Add in the remaining ingredients.
4. Pour over the crust, sprinkling with the remaining crust mixture.
5. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven until lightly browned (about 25 minutes).
6. Cool; cut into 1-1/4-inch squares.
7. Refrigerate, covered. Amount: 48 (1-1/4") squares.
